creator: will@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Committed, thanks.  Next time please use an up-to-date portlint 
to check your Makefiles etc. and use an up-to-date ports/Mk 
because you missed out on some fairly large revolutionary ports 
changes.  Also, I put your tarball on ftp.freebsd.org, with a 
version number (1.0).  This helps differentiate between this 
particular version and future versions.
